tree.setup: Conference room 3B smells faintly of jasmine tea and whiteboard markers. Team leader Xu Wei runs meetings with the precision of a symphony conductor — each agenda item has a time limit, each person gets exactly one chance to speak before the round opens up. He's placed a bowl of tangerines in the center of the table, because he believes productive meetings require vitamin C.
tree.setup_zh: 3B会议室里隐约飘着茉莉花茶和白板笔的气味。团队主管徐伟开会像指挥交响乐一样精准——每个议程都有时限，每个人先发言一次，然后再自由讨论。他在桌子中间放了一碗橘子，因为他相信高效的会议需要维生素C。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好，大家都到了。今天主要讨论新项目的时间安排。谁先说？
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo, dàjiā dōu dào le. jīntiān zhǔyào tǎolùn xīn xiàngmù de shíjiān ānpái. shéi xiān shuō?
turns.text_en: OK, everyone's here. Today we're mainly discussing the schedule for the new project. Who wants to go first?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Volunteer to share your part of the project timeline.

options.text_zh: 我先说吧。我负责的部分大概需要两个星期，下周一可以开始。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ xiān shuō ba. wǒ fùzé de bùfen dàgài xūyào liǎng gè xīngqī, xià zhōuyī kěyǐ kāishǐ.
options.text_en: I'll go first. My part will take about two weeks, and I can start next Monday.
options.feedback: Volunteering to go first and giving a clear timeline — Xu Wei peels a tangerine in your honor.

options.text_zh: 我可以说一下我的部分。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ kěyǐ shuō yíxià wǒ de bùfen.
options.text_en: I can talk about my part.
options.feedback: Willing but unspecific. He'll ask for the details, but he appreciates the initiative.

options.text_zh: 我还没想好，别人先说吧。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ hái méi xiǎng hǎo, biéren xiān shuō ba.
options.text_en: I haven't figured it out yet — let someone else go first.
options.feedback: Xu Wei nods, but makes a small mark next to your name. In his world, unpreparedness is a minor chord in an otherwise clean symphony.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 两个星期，不错。但是客户希望我们一个月之内完成整个项目。你觉得能提前吗？
turns.text_pinyin: liǎng gè xīngqī, búcuò. dànshì kèhù xīwàng wǒmen yí gè yuè zhī nèi wánchéng zhěnggè xiàngmù. nǐ juéde néng tíqián ma?
turns.text_en: Two weeks, not bad. But the client wants the whole project done within a month. Do you think you can finish earlier?

options.text_zh: 如果有人帮忙的话，我可以试试十天完成。但是质量不能降低。
options.text_pinyin: rúguǒ yǒu rén bāngmáng de huà, wǒ kěyǐ shìshi shí tiān wánchéng. dànshì zhìliàng bù néng jiàngdī.
options.text_en: If someone can help, I can try to finish in ten days. But quality can't be compromised.
options.feedback: Conditional commitment with a quality boundary — exactly the kind of answer that makes Xu Wei's whiteboard markers last longer.
尽量 is the universal Chinese office hedge. He's heard it a thousand times, but it's never wrong.

options.text_zh: 我觉得两个星期已经很紧了。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ juéde liǎng gè xīngqī yǐjīng hěn jǐn le.
options.text_en: I think two weeks is already tight.
options.feedback: Honest, and Xu Wei respects that. Better to push back now than to promise and fail later.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好，那我安排小李帮你。还有一件事——周三之前能不能给客户发一份进度报告？
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo, nà wǒ ānpái Xiǎo Lǐ bāng nǐ. hái yǒu yí jiàn shì — zhōusān zhīqián néng bù néng gěi kèhù fā yí fèn jìndù bàogào?
turns.text_en: OK, I'll assign Xiao Li to help you. One more thing — can you send the client a progress report by Wednesday?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Confirm or negotiate the report deadline.

options.text_zh: 没问题，周三之前我一定发。需要用什么格式？
options.text_pinyin: méi wèntí, zhōusān zhīqián wǒ yídìng fā. xūyào yòng shénme géshì?
options.text_en: No problem, I'll definitely send it by Wednesday. What format should I use?
options.feedback: Confirmed and asked about format — proactive. Xu Wei slides a tangerine across the table to you.

options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ huì fā de.
options.feedback: Reliable. He trusts you'll get it done.

options.text_zh: 周三有点赶。周四可以吗？
options.text_pinyin: zhōusān yǒudiǎn gǎn. zhōusì kěyǐ ma?
options.text_en: Wednesday is a bit rushed. Can I do Thursday?
options.feedback: He pauses, recalculates. One day won't break anything — he agrees, but the tangerine stays where it is.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好，今天的会就到这里。大家辛苦了。别忘了拿个橘子。
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo, jīntiān de huì jiù dào zhèlǐ. dàjiā xīnkǔ le. bié wàng le ná gè júzi.
turns.text_en: OK, that's it for today's meeting. Good work everyone. Don't forget to take a tangerine.

options.text_zh: 谢谢徐主管！我回去就开始准备报告。
options.text_pinyin: xièxie Xú zhǔguǎn! wǒ huíqù jiù kāishǐ zhǔnbèi bàogào.
options.text_en: Thanks, Supervisor Xu! I'll start working on the report right away.
options.feedback: Proactive follow-through. Xu Wei's meetings always end with someone inspired — today it's you.
辛苦了 is always the right note to end on. You take a tangerine on the way out.
The shortest possible exit. You didn't take a tangerine, and Xu Wei noticed.

tree.cultural_note: 辛苦了 (xīnkǔ le, 'you've worked hard') is the standard way to acknowledge collective effort at the end of a meeting or workday. It's both a compliment and a farewell — use it generously.
